Move silhouette/glow to outer container, anchor tower to bottom

  container (centered on screen) instead of the rows div

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Anchor tower to bottom so words build up from foundation

justify-end pb-8: single word sits at screen bottom, subsequent
words stack upward — visually builds from the ground up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dynamic rise distance: each row rises from proportional depth below base

Bottom row rises 40px, top row rises (N-1)*50+40px — words physically
travel from the foundation level up to their final position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase towerRowIn translateY for more dramatic rise from base

60px travel distance makes each row visibly rise up from below
instead of barely-noticeable 20px nudge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix word placement to build tower from base

Iterate placement loop bottom→top so base rows (wide, appear first in
animation) win ties over observation deck rows. Big/prominent words now
land at the foundation and visibly appear first as the tower builds up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

feat: add xlsx export button to almas page and fix supabase RLS for superusuario

- Add Excel export button (SheetJS) next to search/filter in almas list
- Fix responsable_grupos RLS policies: 'superuser' -> 'superusuario'
- Add supabase/.temp to .gitignore
- Track supabase/ folder in repo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 终端入库自动查询费率功能 (#12)

实现终端批量入库时自动从支付通道查询费率信息，采用预览-确认两阶段流程。

## 功能特性
- 预览阶段：查询第一个终端费率作为样本展示
- 确认阶段：批量查询所有终端费率并保存
- 动态费率配置：使用 JSONB 支持不同通道的费率类型

## 技术实现

### 后端
- 新增 PreviewImport 接口：POST /api/v1/terminals/preview-import
- 新增 ConfirmImport 接口：POST /api/v1/terminals/confirm-import
- 新增 BatchCreatePolicies 方法：批量创建费率策略
- 新增 GenerateSNList 工具函数：SN 范围生成

### 前端
- 新增费率预览对话框（ElMessageBox）
- 动态渲染不同通道的费率类型
- 集成预览-确认入库流程

### 数据库
- 新增 terminal_policies.rate_configs 字段（JSONB）
- 创建 GIN 索引优化查询性能

## 代码质量
- 单元测试覆盖率 100%
- 消除代码重复（SN 生成逻辑）
- 修复 Nil 指针风险
- 符合 Go 代码规范

## 验证
- 后端编译通过
- 前端编译通过
- 27 项检查全部通过
- 数据库迁移已执行

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: CTASection contrast and SVG accessibility

Reset --color-text-muted in CTASection for its light background context,
fixing 2.13:1 contrast ratio when inherited from dark blog post parent.

Fix training bugs: early stopping, VMamba/Mamba2 AMP dtype, AMP flag wiring

- Fix early stopping: Trainer now checks callback.should_stop (was ignoring it)
- Fix VMamba selective_scan_fn dtype mismatch under AMP: cast all tensors to

- Fix Mamba2 mamba_chunk_scan_combined same AMP dtype issue
- Wire --mixed_precision CLI flag to TrainingConfig.use_amp (was dead code)
- Add Colab Pro training notebook with Drive sync and TensorBoard monitoring

commit.message:
Add ANE internals doc — everything maderix didn't cover

New discoveries beyond maderix/ANE:
- _ANEInMemoryModel 13-ivar layout with offsets
- Multi-procedure MIL models (N functions, procedureIndex dispatch)
- doEvaluateDirectWithModel: direct eval (10% faster)
- Complete _ANEClient API (25 methods)
- 10 chaining classes fully mapped
- _ANEIOSurfaceOutputSets correct factory method
- CoreML MLProgram → Espresso → MLNeuralNetworkEngine pipeline
- IOKit H11ANE: 3 user client types, 50 selectors
- MLModelConfiguration 32 undocumented properties
- _ANEDeviceController + ANEDeviceStruct layout
- Session hints, real-time path, compiler options

commit.message:
Add LLM fallback (gpt-4o-mini) for medium confidence product matching

When fuzzy matching returns medium confidence (0.55-0.80), ask gpt-4o-mini
to classify the product from the full catalog list. Handles cases like
reversed words ("Breeze Summer" → "Summer"), creative customer names,
and ambiguous fuzzy matches.

- _resolve_via_llm(): OpenAI SDK call with validation against known names
- Inserted as Step 5 in resolve_product_name() cascade
- Feature flag USE_LLM_RESOLVER (default: true)
- Graceful fallback: API errors → medium confidence → operator alert
- 5 unit tests with mocked OpenAI client
- All 311 tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

console (visible in Render logs) without exposing anything to users.

bump version to 1.1.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: AIDA capability evaluation — three-perspective analysis with tri-frequency operating rhythm

Third-party expert + code review + Aida self-assessment of AIDA's readiness
for commercial deployment. Key finding: infrastructure is complete but Aida
lacks operating instructions to use it. Proposes tri-frequency rhythm model
(Event real-time + HEARTBEAT in-session + Cron scheduled) as zero-engine-code
replacement for the removed ProcessManager + RuleEvaluator.

Also adds Phase 14 review report and syncs CLAUDE.md project progress section.

commit.message:
feat: PX-2 — extend missing rate detection to edges, cutouts, and all category rates (#353)

Extended missingRates[] detection from 1 site (PX-1) to 7 sites:
- Deactivated edge types: detected when piece has edge assigned but type not in active list
- Deactivated cutout types: detected when cutout type not found in active cutout_types
- Engine rate throws: calculateEngineQuote wrapped in try/catch with zeroed fallback
- Edge category rate $0: post-engine detection when edge profile has $0 rate
- Cutout category rate $0: post-engine detection when cutout has $0 rate
- Waterfall rate missing: detected when waterfall pieces exist but no rate configured
- getServiceRateSafe (PX-1): existing JOIN rate detection preserved

Calculator never crashes on any missing rate. All missing rates surface in the
existing PX-1 amber banner via missingRates[] array.

commit.message:
fix(gallery): sync feedback on immersive Link button for iOS Safari

iOS Safari hangs the Clipboard API promise when called from within an
overflow-y/scroll-snap scroll context. Switch to a non-async handler
that shows 'Copied!' synchronously, then fires the clipboard write as
a best-effort side effect.

fix: resolve dashboard data loading — clubs permissions, null safety, independent fetches

- Fix Firestore security rules for clubs to allow both document-based
  (mobile/isOwner) and collection-query (web/resource.data.userId) access
- Add composite index for clubs (userId + createdAt) to firestore.indexes.json
- Fix getRounds() to fall back to unordered query when composite index missing
- Fix calculateStatistics() with null/undefined guards on all array operations
- Fix analytics to use Promise.allSettled so clubs failure doesn't kill rounds/stats
- Add safeStats fallback in analytics so page renders even if stats fetch fails
- Add visible error banner on dashboard showing actual error message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix updateIPFSHash ABI mismatch — contract only takes (string), not (string, bytes)

The deployed contract's updateIPFSHash(string) encodes the ENS contenthash
internally. The frontend ABI had an extra `bytes` parameter causing every
updateIPFSHash tx to call the wrong function selector and silently revert,
leaving users without a contenthash on their ENS subdomain.

commit.message:
Initial release: TDA-based political opinion space analysis toolbox

Implements topological analysis pipeline for detecting non-orientable
structure (Möbius twists) in political deliberation data using persistent
homology, holonomy detection, and Z₂-bundle theory.

Core modules:
- Persistent homology via ripser (H0 clusters, H1 loops)
- 4 holonomy detection approaches (graph, embedding, TDA, Z₂-bundle)
- Polis deliberation platform data loader
- Synthetic Möbius-structure data generation
- Multi-panel dashboard visualizations

Analysis scripts for synthetic and real data (Bowling Green, vTaiwan).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix View Transition script race condition across 61 pages

On first client-side navigation to a new page type, the page's module
script loads async (via swapHeadElements) but astro:page-load fires
sync right after the swap. The page's event listener registers too late
and misses the event — the page appears broken until a second visit.

Fix:
- Add onPageLoad() helper that runs the callback immediately AND
  registers for future astro:page-load events, with WeakSet dedup
- Migrate 61 pages from raw astro:page-load to onPageLoad()
- Move native-tokens import from layout.ts to setup.ts so element
  registration is available before any client-side navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
